vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa/hợp lý hóa quy trình làm việc
vocab.example: I frequently visit project management sites that help streamline my workflow and keep my tasks organized.

vocab.meaning: khắc phục các sự cố kỹ thuật
vocab.example: Tech forums are my go-to whenever I need to troubleshoot technical hitches with my software or hardware.

vocab.meaning: thu lượm/tìm kiếm nguồn cảm hứng
vocab.example: I often browse portfolio websites like Behance to garner inspiration for my own creative endeavors.

vocab.meaning: cập nhật kịp thời (tin tức, xu hướng)
vocab.example: I make it a point to visit financial news sites daily to stay abreast of the latest market fluctuations.
I spend a fair amount of time on blogs dedicated to my niche interest in vintage analogue photography.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra
vocab.example: Platforms like Reddit are fascinating because they rely entirely on user-generated content and community discussions.
I enjoy visiting documentary websites as they really help broaden my horizons regarding global environmental issues.

vocab.meaning: cổng thông tin có lưu lượng truy cập cao
vocab.example: Most of the websites I visit are high-traffic portals that provide reliable and real-time news updates.
I'm particularly fond of e-commerce sites that offer seamless navigation and a quick checkout process.

vocab.meaning: kiềm chế/giải tỏa sự buồn chán
vocab.example: When I have a few minutes to kill, I usually visit entertainment sites to curb my boredom with short videos.
